scene: Teen blob Byte sleeping peacefully in cozy bed at night, three light blue Z's floating gently above head in scattered formation, Chicago skyline twinkling through window

subjects.description: Byte the teen blob, gangly limbs tucked under soft blankets in cozy bed, eyes closed in peaceful slumber, soft blue blob form resting comfortably

anchor environment: wooden desk with oversized silver laptop, screen glowing softly in night darkness, trophy shelf above with golden 10-day trophy on left and green plant on right, Chicago skyline window showing city lights
subjects.action: static environment anchor, laptop providing soft glow

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: deep night purple-blue darkness, laptop screen providing soft amber glow, city lights twinkling through window
mood: peaceful, restful, content despite inactive hours
background: dark room with window showing Chicago skyline at night, trophy shelf holding trophy and plant, bed occupying center, desk and laptop in corner
composition: Byte in bed center stage, window behind showing night city, desk and laptop visible to the side with soft glow
